## Hello

👋 I’m Gregory Perozzo  
💻 Senior Full-stack Engineer  
⚙️ I build cloud-native platforms with .NET, Angular, Azure, and SQL Server<br>
⚓ 15+ years of experience building real-world software solutions

> “A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor — Franklin D. Roosevelt

## About me

I'm a software engineer with 14+ years of experience designing, developing, and maintaining real-world systems for businesses, startups, and government-related operations.

My work usually involves turning complex business rules into reliable platforms, building APIs, creating modern front-end experiences, improving performance, and helping products evolve from idea to production.

I enjoy working close to the product and business side of software, especially when technology can simplify operations, improve user experience, and create measurable value.

## What I build

- SaaS platforms and business management systems
- RESTful APIs and back-end services
- Angular web applications with modern UI/UX
- Cloud-hosted applications on Microsoft Azure
- SQL Server database structures, queries, and optimization
- Integrations between internal systems, external APIs, and third-party services
- Mobile and operational applications using Xamarin.Android

> **Software as art. Business as context. Engineering as execution.**
